allow: Bash(PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION="proceed with the reset" DATABASE_URL="file:./prisma/dev.db" npx prisma migrate reset --force)
Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./prisma/dev.db" npx prisma migrate dev --name sync_schema)
Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./prisma/dev.db" npx prisma migrate dev --name sync_schema --create-only)
Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./prisma/dev.db" npx prisma migrate diff --from-migrations prisma/migrations --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script)
Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./prisma/dev.db" npx prisma migrate diff --from-migrations prisma/migrations --to-schema prisma/schema.prisma --script)
Bash(sqlite3 dev.db "SELECT id, name, clerkId FROM Athlete ORDER BY name;")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT id, name, clerkId FROM Athlete ORDER BY name;")
